footer.rights: Your code is processed privately and never stored.

home.metaTitle: Neatly — Free Online Developer Tools: Beautify, Minify, Format & Convert
home.metaDesc: Free developer tools to get your work done — beautify & minify JavaScript, CSS & HTML, format & validate JSON, convert JSON/YAML/CSV/XML, diff & compare, scan & generate QR codes, and more. Private, no sign-up.
home.lead: Paste minified code to unpack and prettify it, or compress your source to ship less. Works with JavaScript, CSS, HTML, JSON, XML and more — fast, free and private.

features.heading: Everything you need to tidy up code
features.sub: A fast, modern alternative for beautifying and minifying source files — no sign-up required.

beautify.title: Beautify & unminify
beautify.text: Turn minified, packed or obfuscated code back into clean, readable, properly indented source.

minify.title: Minify & compress
minify.text: Strip whitespace and comments to ship smaller JavaScript, CSS, HTML, JSON and XML.

languages.title: Five languages
languages.text: JavaScript & TypeScript, CSS, HTML, JSON and XML — auto-detected as you paste.

instant.title: Instant & accurate
instant.text: Powered by battle-tested engines for reliable results every time.

private.title: Private by default
private.text: Your code is processed on the fly and never stored — nothing is saved or shared.

friction.title: Zero friction
friction.text: Paste, drop a file, or upload. Copy or download the result in a single click.

convert.metaTitle: JSON to YAML, CSV & XML Converter — Free Online Data Converter · Neatly
convert.metaDesc: Convert JSON to YAML, CSV or XML — and back — instantly and free. Paste your data, pick the formats, then copy or download the result. Private, fast, no sign-up.
convert.lead: Transform data between JSON, YAML, CSV and XML in one click. Paste, pick your formats, and copy the result.
convert.placeholder: Paste your data or drop a file here…

compare.metaTitle: JSON Diff & Compare — Compare 2, 3 or 4 JSON Files Online · Neatly
compare.metaDesc: Free online JSON diff tool. Compare 2–4 JSON files side by side, see exactly which field differs in which file, and get a plain-language conclusion — instantly and privately.
compare.lead: Paste two or more JSON objects and Neatly shows exactly which fields differ, in which input, plus a clear conclusion. Add up to four at once.
compare.fixError: Please fix the highlighted JSON input(s) before comparing.
compare.cardPlaceholder: Paste JSON here or drop a .json file…
compare.identical: All inputs match. There are no differences to show.

jsonViewer.metaTitle: JSON Viewer & Validator — Format, Validate & Explore JSON Online · Neatly
jsonViewer.metaDesc: Free online JSON viewer and validator. Paste JSON to validate it, see errors with line numbers, and explore it in a collapsible tree. Format, minify or sort keys instantly — private, no sign-up.
jsonViewer.lead: Paste JSON to validate it instantly, jump to errors by line, and explore the structure in a collapsible tree. Format, minify or sort keys in a click.
jsonViewer.empty: Paste JSON to validate and explore it here.

jsonToTs.metaTitle: JSON to TypeScript — Generate Interfaces from JSON Online · Neatly
jsonToTs.metaDesc: Free online JSON to TypeScript converter. Paste JSON and instantly generate matching TypeScript interfaces. Private, in your browser, no sign-up.
jsonToTs.lead: Paste JSON and get matching TypeScript interfaces instantly, including nested objects and arrays.

diff.metaTitle: Text Diff Checker — Compare Two Texts Online Free · Neatly
diff.metaDesc: Free online diff checker. Compare two texts or code snippets and see exactly which lines were added or removed, highlighted side by side. Private, instant, no sign-up.
diff.lead: Paste two versions of a text or code and instantly see which lines were added or removed.
diff.empty: Paste both texts to see the differences here.

color.metaTitle: Color Converter — HEX, RGB & HSL Online + Contrast Checker · Neatly
color.metaDesc: Free online color converter. Convert between HEX, RGB and HSL, pick a color, preview it, and check WCAG contrast against black and white. Private, instant, no sign-up.
color.lead: Convert colors between HEX, RGB and HSL, preview them, and check WCAG contrast — all in your browser.

regex.metaTitle: Regex Tester — Test Regular Expressions Online · Neatly
regex.metaDesc: Free online regex tester. Build and test regular expressions with live match highlighting, flags and capture groups. Runs privately in your browser, no sign-up.
regex.lead: Write a regular expression and see matches highlighted live, with capture groups — all in your browser.

base64.metaTitle: Base64 Encode & Decode — Free Online Base64 Converter · Neatly
base64.metaDesc: Free online Base64 encoder and decoder. Convert text to Base64 and back, UTF-8 safe, instantly and privately in your browser. No sign-up.
base64.lead: Convert text to Base64 and back. Handles Unicode correctly and runs entirely in your browser.
base64.placeholder: Type or paste text to encode…

urlEncode.metaTitle: URL Encode & Decode — Free Online URL Encoder/Decoder · Neatly
urlEncode.metaDesc: Free online URL encoder and decoder. Percent-encode text for URLs or decode it back, instantly and privately in your browser. No sign-up.
urlEncode.lead: Percent-encode text so it's safe inside a URL, or decode an encoded string back to plain text.
urlEncode.placeholder: Type or paste text to encode…

jwt.metaTitle: JWT Decoder — Decode JSON Web Tokens Online · Neatly
jwt.metaDesc: Free online JWT decoder. Paste a JSON Web Token to decode its header and payload and read the claims (exp, iat…). Decoding is done privately in your browser — tokens are never sent anywhere.
jwt.lead: Paste a JSON Web Token to inspect its header and payload. Decoding happens in your browser — your token is never uploaded.

hash.metaTitle: Hash Generator — SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384 & SHA-512 Online · Neatly
hash.metaDesc: Free online hash generator. Compute SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384 and SHA-512 hashes of any text instantly and privately in your browser. No sign-up.
hash.lead: Generate SHA hashes of any text. Everything is computed locally in your browser using the Web Crypto API.

uuid.metaTitle: UUID Generator — Generate v4 UUIDs Online Free · Neatly
uuid.metaDesc: Free online UUID generator. Instantly generate one or many random version-4 UUIDs and copy them with one click. Runs privately in your browser, no sign-up.
uuid.lead: Generate random v4 UUIDs instantly. Pick how many you need and copy them individually or all at once.

timestamp.metaTitle: Unix Timestamp Converter — Epoch to Date & Back Online · Neatly
timestamp.metaDesc: Free online Unix timestamp converter. Convert an epoch timestamp to a human-readable date (local, UTC, ISO) and turn a date back into a timestamp. Private, instant, no sign-up.
timestamp.lead: Convert a Unix (epoch) timestamp to a readable date, or turn any date back into a timestamp.
timestamp.tsHint: Enter a Unix timestamp in seconds or milliseconds.
timestamp.dtHint: Pick a date and time to get its Unix timestamp.

scan.metaTitle: QR Code Scanner Online — Scan & Extract Text from QR Codes & Barcodes · Neatly
scan.metaDesc: Free online QR code scanner and reader. Scan with your camera or upload/paste an image to decode QR codes and barcodes and extract the text, URL, Wi-Fi or contact — instantly and privately in your browser.
scan.lead: Read and extract text from QR codes and barcodes using your camera, an uploaded image, or a pasted screenshot — everything runs privately in your browser.
scan.aboutP1: Neatly's scanner reads QR codes and common barcode formats (EAN, UPC, Code 128, Code 39, ITF and more) right in your browser. Point your camera at a code, upload a photo, or paste a screenshot — the decoded text appears instantly, and links, emails and phone numbers become one-tap actions.
scan.aboutP2: Because scanning happens entirely on your device, the images and camera frames are never uploaded or stored. It works great for reading links on posters, product barcodes, Wi-Fi codes and contact cards.
scan.cameraHint: Click “Start camera” to scan a QR code or barcode.
scan.empty: Point your camera at a code, or upload an image — the result appears here.

qrGen.metaTitle: QR Code Generator — Create QR Codes & Barcodes Online Free · Neatly
qrGen.metaDesc: Free online QR code generator. Create QR codes for URLs, text, Wi-Fi, email, phone and vCard — customise colors and size, and download as PNG or SVG. Barcodes too. Private, no sign-up.
qrGen.lead: Create QR codes for links, text, Wi-Fi, email, phone numbers and contact cards — pick your colors and size, then download as PNG or SVG. Everything runs privately in your browser.
qrGen.aboutP1: Neatly's generator creates high-quality QR codes for URLs, plain text, Wi-Fi networks, email, phone numbers and vCard contacts, plus common barcode formats (CODE128, EAN, UPC, CODE39 and more). Customise the foreground and background colors, size and error-correction level, then export a crisp PNG or an infinitely scalable SVG.
qrGen.aboutP2: Everything is generated on your device — nothing is uploaded — so it's fast, private and free, with no watermark and no sign-up.
qrGen.empty: Fill in the fields to generate your code.

about.metaTitle: About Neatly — Fast, Private Developer Tools
about.metaDesc: About Neatly: a growing collection of fast, private, free developer tools — beautify, minify, convert, compare, scan and generate — built with no sign-up and no tracking.
about.lead: Neatly is a growing collection of fast, private developer tools. Beautify and minify code, convert and compare data, scan and generate QR codes, and more — all in one place, with no sign-up.
about.fastX: Clean, instant tools that get out of your way — no bloat, no waiting.
about.privateX: Your data is processed on the fly and never stored. Scanning and many tools run entirely in your browser.
about.freeX: Every tool is free, with no sign-up, no account and no watermark.
about.allX: Beautify, minify, convert, compare, validate, scan and generate — from one tidy place.
about.makerText: Neatly is designed and built by Maulana, a developer who enjoys making fast, well-crafted web tools. Have feedback or a feature idea?

contact.metaDesc: Get in touch with Maulana, the developer behind Neatly. Questions, feedback or ideas are always welcome.
contact.bio: I design and build fast, private, well-crafted web tools — like the ones you're using here. If you have feedback, an idea, or just want to say hi, I'd love to hear from you.
contact.getInTouchText: Questions, feedback, feature ideas or just a hello — drop me a message any time.
contact.aroundWebText: Find my code and other work here.
contact.aboutNeatlyText: A growing collection of fast, private developer tools — beautify, minify, convert, compare, scan and generate — free and no sign-up.

toolsPage.metaTitle: All Tools — Beautify, Minify, Convert, Scan & More · Neatly
toolsPage.metaDesc: Every Neatly developer tool in one place — beautify & minify, convert, compare & validate JSON, scan & generate QR codes, and encode/hash utilities. Free, private, no sign-up.
toolsPage.lead: Every Neatly tool in one place — beautify, minify, convert, compare, scan, generate and more.

passwordGen.metaTitle: Password Generator — Create Strong Random Passwords · Neatly
passwordGen.metaDesc: Free online password generator. Create strong, random passwords with custom length, letters, numbers and symbols — generated securely in your browser, never stored.
passwordGen.lead: Create strong, cryptographically-random passwords. Choose the length and character sets, then copy — everything happens in your browser.
passwordGen.noSet: Select at least one character set.

caseConv.metaTitle: Case Converter — camelCase, snake_case, kebab & slug Online · Neatly
caseConv.metaDesc: Free online case converter. Convert text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE and slugs — instantly and privately.
caseConv.lead: Convert text between every common case — camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, Title Case and URL slugs — in one place.

numberBase.metaTitle: Number Base Converter — Binary, Octal, Decimal & Hex · Neatly
numberBase.metaDesc: Free online number base converter. Convert between binary, octal, decimal and hexadecimal instantly — big-integer safe, private, no sign-up.
numberBase.lead: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal and hexadecimal. Type in any field and the rest update instantly.
numberBase.invalid: That value isn't valid for the selected base.

lorem.metaTitle: Lorem Ipsum Generator — Copy Paragraphs or the Full Article · Neatly
lorem.metaDesc: A nicer lorem ipsum generator: choose paragraphs, words-per-paragraph and options, then copy any paragraph individually or the whole article at once. Free, private.
lorem.lead: Generate clean placeholder text. Tweak the amount, copy any paragraph on its own, or grab the whole article in one click.

mdTool.metaTitle: Markdown to HTML — Convert & Preview Markdown Online · Neatly
mdTool.metaDesc: Free online Markdown to HTML converter with live preview. Paste Markdown, see it rendered, and copy the clean, sanitized HTML. Private, in your browser, no sign-up.
mdTool.lead: Write or paste Markdown and see it rendered live, then copy the sanitized HTML. Everything runs in your browser.
mdTool.empty: Type Markdown to see the preview.

sqlTool.metaTitle: SQL Formatter — Beautify & Format SQL Queries Online · Neatly
sqlTool.metaDesc: Free online SQL formatter and beautifier. Paste a messy query and get clean, indented SQL — choose dialect, keyword case and indent. Private, in your browser, no sign-up.
sqlTool.lead: Paste a messy SQL query and get clean, readable, properly indented SQL. Pick your dialect and keyword case.

cronTool.metaTitle: Cron Expression Explainer — Parse & Understand Cron Online · Neatly
cronTool.metaDesc: Free online cron expression explainer. Paste a crontab schedule to see it in plain English plus the next run times. Private, in your browser, no sign-up.
cronTool.lead: Paste a cron expression to see what it means in plain English and when it runs next.
cronTool.invalid: That doesn't look like a valid cron expression.

imgB64.metaTitle: Image to Base64 — Convert Images to Data URI Online · Neatly
imgB64.metaDesc: Free online image to Base64 / data URI converter. Drop or paste an image and copy it as a data URI, CSS background, HTML img or Markdown. Private, in your browser, no upload.
imgB64.lead: Turn any image into a Base64 data URI you can embed directly in CSS, HTML or Markdown — all in your browser, nothing uploaded.
imgB64.empty: Add an image to get its Base64 data URI.

yamlTool.metaTitle: YAML Validator & Formatter — Free Online Tool | Neatly
yamlTool.metaDesc: Validate YAML online and see the exact error line, then pretty-print it or copy it as JSON. Fast, private, runs entirely in your browser.
yamlTool.lead: Catch indentation and syntax mistakes with a precise error line, then clean up your config or convert it to JSON — all in your browser.
yamlTool.empty: Paste YAML to validate and format it.

converter.invalidInput: This doesn't look like valid input for {mode}. Check it and try again.

textTools.metaTitle: Text Utilities — Word Counter, Sort, Dedupe & Case | Neatly
textTools.metaDesc: Count words, characters and lines; sort or dedupe lines; change case; find & replace with regex. Fast text tools that run entirely in your browser.
textTools.lead: Word and character counts, sort or remove duplicate lines, change case, and find & replace — all in one place, private in your browser.
textTools.placeholder: Type or paste your text here…

timezoneTool.metaTitle: Timezone Converter — Compare Times Across Zones | Neatly
timezoneTool.metaDesc: Convert a time between time zones and compare it across several cities at once. Handles DST automatically and runs entirely in your browser.
timezoneTool.lead: Pick a moment in one zone and see it instantly in as many others as you like — daylight saving handled for you, all in your browser.

metaTags.metaTitle: Meta Tag & Open Graph Generator — Social Preview | Neatly
metaTags.metaDesc: Generate SEO meta tags, Open Graph and Twitter Card markup, and preview how your page looks on Google, Facebook and Twitter. Free and private.
metaTags.lead: Fill in your page details and copy ready-to-paste SEO, Open Graph and Twitter tags — with a live preview of your Google, Facebook and Twitter cards.
metaTags.sampleDesc: Your meta description will appear here.

urlParser.metaTitle: URL Parser — Break Down & Edit URLs | Neatly
urlParser.metaDesc: Parse any URL into protocol, host, port, path, query and fragment, edit its query parameters and rebuild it. Fast and private in your browser.
urlParser.lead: Paste a URL to split it into its parts, decode and edit query parameters, and copy the rebuilt link — all in your browser.
urlParser.invalid: That doesn't look like a valid URL.
